stemHtml: In a modern jet aircraft, how does an AHRS (Attitude and Heading Reference System) measure and display information?

options.a: Measures in 2 axes and is displayed on individual instruments.
options.b: Measures in 3 axes and is displayed on electronic displays.
options.c: Measures in 2 axes and is displayed on electronic displays.
options.d: Measures in 3 axes and is displayed on individual instruments.
